title: elymus pycnanthus
intro: Elymus pycnanthus, also known as the wood grass or Korean wood grass, is a type of perennial grass native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus pycnanthus include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Elymus pycnanthus is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional cooking and food medicine.
